basic_details.job_title: HCI Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Hotel Corporation of India Limited (HCI) has published the Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026 notification on the official website https://www.centaurhotels.com. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Chief Financial Officer position on a contractual basis. Candidates up to 62 years of age and holding the qualification of Qualified Chartered Accountant from ICAI or Cost Accountant from ICMAI are eligible to apply through the offline application process up to 15 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application form are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 62 years as on 01-07-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Qualified Chartered Accountant from ICAI or Cost Accountant from ICMAI
qualification.details: Qualified Chartered Accountant from the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India OR Cost Accountant from Institute of Cost Accountants of India. Should be a member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India or a member of the Cost & Works Accountants of India. 10 Years post qualification experience in Maintenance of Accounts, Budgetary Control, Final Accounts, Expenditure Accounting, Revenue Account Statutory Compliance, Auditing and Taxation matters, Working Capital management, Financial Planning etc. Preference for Government/PSU experience. Out of 10 years, 02 years in senior position (E-6 and above in Central/State PSE or not more than 2 levels below CEO in Private sector listed companies).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for HCI Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.centaurhotels.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download HCI Chief Financial Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download HCI Chief Financial Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HCI Chief Financial Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the HCI Chief Financial Officer post is 15th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Chief Financial Officer position?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Qualified Chartered Accountants from ICAI or Cost Accountants from ICMAI, and be a member of their respective institutes.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Chief Financial Officer post is 62 years as of 1st July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Chief Financial Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 1,25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy for the post of Chief Financial Officer.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity with the Hotel Corporation of India Limited.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Chief Financial Officer post?
faq.answer: The selection process will include an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of HCI, which is www.centaurhotels.com. Links are also provided in the Important Links section of this article.
